name: Channel Mix Analysis
description: Track how marketing channel mix has shifted over time, with consistent attribution definitions across periods. Period-over-period comparison is real because the underlying definitions are governed.
alsoSurfaces: How has our channel mix shifted over the last 4 quarters?
Is LinkedIn genuinely growing, or did it just have a strong month?
Which channels lost share fastest period-over-period?
Where does the channel taxonomy diverge across our connected sources?
beforeWeRun: Time period coverage: last 4 quarters, 8 quarters, or custom?
Canonical attribution model: tenant default, or override for this view?
Refresh schedule: daily, weekly, or on-demand only?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Total spend, attributed pipeline, attributed revenue, blended ROAS, CAC, for current period with QoQ deltas.

whatYoullGet.name: Channel mix over time
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked area chart of channel share across all periods in the coverage.

whatYoullGet.name: Per-channel trend lines
whatYoullGet.desc: Small-multiple trend lines, one per channel, on shared axes for cross-comparison.

whatYoullGet.name: Channel performance table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table with all metrics per channel, with PoP delta columns.

whatYoullGet.name: Channel-level drill-down
whatYoullGet.desc: Click any channel for campaign- and creative-level breakouts.

callout: 5 quick inputs, then Sage builds your channel mix dashboard in ~10 min.
